data.name: 愛與夢
data.detailed_description:
❤ COMING SOON Q1 2022 ❤



關於此遊戲

功能

  • 連接所有管道以完成拼圖（時間和運氣將決定您可以走多遠）
  • 可收藏物品-在整個階段，玩家將有機會從角色中取回物品並進一步了解她們。
  • 來自不同背景的7個卡哇伊女孩正在等你！
  • 角色進行各種互動。
  • 可愛的聲音，每個角色都有不同的個性。
  • 祝你好運，結局愉快！ ！
data.about_the_game:
功能

  • 連接所有管道以完成拼圖（時間和運氣將決定您可以走多遠）
  • 可收藏物品-在整個階段，玩家將有機會從角色中取回物品並進一步了解她們。
  • 來自不同背景的7個卡哇伊女孩正在等你！
  • 角色進行各種互動。

data.short_description: 《愛與夢》是一個有很多可愛女孩的拼圖遊戲。您將扮演多個角色，與所有的女孩們接觸。您的工作是通過應用您的技能來解決所有難題並更多地了解她們，從而釋放她們的期望，特徵，愛好，討厭。
data.supported_languages:
英文, 日文*, 簡體中文, 繁體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: Intel Pentium D 830 (2 * 3000) or equivalent
  • 顯示卡: Geforce GT 610 (1024 MB) or equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間

data.name: Love n Dream
data.detailed_description:
❤ COMING SOON Q1 2022 ❤



About the Game

Features

  • Connect all the pipe to complete puzzle (time and luck will determine how far you can go)
  • Collectible Item - along all the stage, player will have chance to retrieve item from character and understand more about them.
  • 7 kawaii girls from different backgrounds are waiting for you!!
  • Various interaction follow up with the character.
  • Cute voice with different personality from every character.
  • Good luck and happy ending!!
data.about_the_game:
Features

  • Connect all the pipe to complete puzzle (time and luck will determine how far you can go)
  • Collectible Item - along all the stage, player will have chance to retrieve item from character and understand more about them.
  • 7 kawaii girls from different backgrounds are waiting for you!!
  • Various interaction follow up with the character.
  • Cute voice with different personality from every character.
  • Good luck and happy ending!!
data.short_description: 《Love n Dream》 is a puzzle game with many kawaii girls. You will be transformed into multiple roles to approach all of our girls. Your job is to unlock their desired, characteristic, favorite, hate by using your skill to solve all the puzzles and understand more about them.
data.supported_languages:
English, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • Processor: Intel Pentium D 830 (2 * 3000) or equivalent
  • Graphics: Geforce GT 610 (1024 MB) or equivalent
  • Storage: 500 MB available space
